INSURANCE POLICY COVERAGE AGREEMENT
This agreement is governed by the laws of the United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of New York.
Payment terms require payment of the premium on or before the due date.
Default provisions apply if premium payment is missed. Notice period for cancellation is 30 days.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
